title: alnus japonica var. arguta
intro: Alnus japonica var. arguta, also known as the Japanese mountain alder, is a variety of tree that belongs to the alder family and is native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alnus japonica var. arguta include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
